calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Barbara M. Anscher; Clerk: L. Fong; Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances on WED-JUL-06-2016:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is represented by Robert Crosby
Attorney John P. Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant David Smith is present.
Attorney Bao-Tran Dang appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants, and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of July 11, 2016 is vacated. (501/JPT)
